cards.prompt: type inference: Echo<T>(T x)=>x; Echo(42) -> r и r.GetType().Name?
cards.code: using System; T Echo<T>(T x) => x; var r = Echo(42); Console.WriteLine($"{r} {r.GetType().Name}");

cards.prompt: no type erasure: typeof(T).Name for int and string inside a generic?
cards.code: using System; string TypeOf<T>() => typeof(T).Name; Console.WriteLine($"{TypeOf<int>()} {TypeOf<string>()}");

cards.prompt: open vs closed: typeof(List<>) vs typeof(List<int>) — IsGenericTypeDefinition x2, IsConstructedGenericType?
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; Type open = typeof(List<>); Type closed = typeof(List<int>); Console.WriteLine($"{open.IsGenericTypeDefinition} {closed.IsGenericTypeDefinition} {closed.IsConstructedGenericType}");
